scripts.build: next build --webpack && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const src=path.join(root,'.next','static');const out=path.join(root,'.next','standalone','.next','static');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,out,{recursive:true,force:true});}const pub=path.join(root,'public');const pubOut=path.join(root,'.next','standalone','public');if(fs.existsSync(pub)){fs.mkdirSync(pubOut,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(pub,pubOut,{recursive:true,force:true});}console.log('[build] standalone static/public synced');"
